steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks: “Which statement about the mycelium of the twenty mushroom species is best supported by the text?” We need the answer choice that the passage’s evidence directly confirms.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘Variation in thermoregulation across the mycelium may occur independent of the presence or absence of fruited bodies.’: The passage states that the temperature difference persisted even after fruited bodies were detached, proving the mycelium’s thermoregulation is not caused by the fruited bodies. This is directly supported. ✓
  • Choice B: Misstates the temperature relationship between fruiting and nonfruiting sites, contradicting passage details. ✗
  • Choice C: Introduces unmentioned details about mycelium structure not found in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D: Makes an unsupported comparison that the passage does not address. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
